Only minor jitter is the hand-spaced 'MEMORY' and full-width 'WHAT WAS' rows nudging the inner wall by a few cells - reads as intentional ornament. Not safely whitespace-fixable without risking the radiating-arrow pattern; left clean.

Recursion flowchart (f(n) -> base/recurse -> nested stack -> multiply -> result) inside a block-shaded bevel frame. Right border в–Ҳв–“в–’в–‘ is flush on all body rows (verified identical tail), nodes and arrows align on a clean grid; the в–‘в–’в–“ taper on the outer bands is the intentional bevel. Clean.

PAST<-NOW->FUTURE / ENTROPY quadrant-axis diagram (MEMORY|POTENTIAL, CRYSTALLIZED|PROBABILISTIC) in a shaded frame. Left border (col 4) and central axis (col 42) are perfectly columnar and the gradient flanks + content are internally consistent with their right border at col 79. The defect is the 4 solid frame bars (rows 6,7,39,40) extending to col 85 - 6 cols wider than the rest of the box. Cannot fix with spaces only: rows 6 and 40 are solid в–Ҳ runs, so narrowing them to match removes drawn в–Ҳ glyphs. Needs the top/bottom bars re-drawn 6 cells narrower.

Ornate bordered card (TRANSFINITE ESCALATION / HYPERALGORITHMIC COGNOS, EMPYREAN-QUANTUM FORMS inner panel, RUNIC ENCODING, THE COSMIC LOTUS, ULTIMATE SYNTHESIS footer) with в•Ұ/в•¬/в•© column dividers. note: Big bordered 'DERIVE' consciousness card. Outer в•”в•җв•— frame is 83 chars but content lines run 84-128 chars because they're packed with wide glyphs (alchemical emoji рҹң”рҹңҒрҹңӮ, вҹЁПҲ|ПҶвҹ©, вҹӘвҹ«, math operators) that the gallery forces into 1 cell each вҖ” so the right в•‘ border scatters all down the page. Not whitespace-fixable: many lines already overshoot the border width with non-space glyphs, so flushing would require removing/changing glyphs (e.g. trimming the wide-glyph runs or padding the 83-char borders).

'DERIVE вҖ” HYPER-SYSTEM OF CONSCIOUSNESS' two-column framed card (в•Ұ/в•¬/в•© divider at col 65 creating a thin right sidebar of рҹқҡрҹқӣрҹқң). Borders are 75 chars; 27 content lines exceed that (up to 104) due to wide-glyph content (alchemical emoji, в–‘в–’в–“ shading, math symbols). Both the right в•‘ border and the interior divider scatter; the thin sidebar disintegrates. Not whitespace-fixable вҖ” interior glyph content already overshoots col 65/75 on many lines, so alignment needs glyph-level reflow.

'HOLOGRAPHIC CONSCIOUSNESS MATRIX' вҖ” near-identical sibling of p00780, same two-column в•Ұ/в•¬/в•© frame and wide-glyph payload. Borders 75 chars; 27 content lines exceed that (up to 104). Right border and divider scatter in the 1-cell grid. Not whitespace-fixable for the same reason: glyph content overshoots the border column, so flushing would require removing/changing glyphs.

'LIFE-DEATH CYCLE NEXUS' vertical box-stack (ENTROPY crown, FORM/STRUCTURE/DYNAMICS/.../MEANING-MAKING boxes, runes footer). Boxes share a consistent left edge (lead 115) but right в•‘/в•Ј rails run 116-160 chars because of varying wide-glyph counts (рҹңғ, вҮҢ, в—Ҡ, runes бҡ бҡўбҡҰ, CJK з”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„з¬Ұж–Ү). Right rail fragments scatter down the page and the whole figure sits far off-center to the right. Not whitespace-fixable: interior glyphs overshoot the rail column inconsistently (e.g. line len 160 vs rail 136), so closing the frame needs glyph-level changes.

'RECURSE вҖ” HOLOGRAPHIC FRACTAL OF CONSCIOUSNESS', a triple-nested frame (outer в•‘ + two side-rail columns + inner в”Ӯ box + innermost в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”җ) with the heaviest wide-glyph load of the set (long alchemical-emoji runs рҹң”рҹң•рҹң–, рҹқҡрҹқӣрҹқң, arrows, math operators). Outer border 83 chars but 21 of 32 content lines exceed it (up to 124). All nested right borders scatter in the 1-cell grid. Not whitespace-fixable вҖ” glyph content overshoots the border width on most lines, so alignment requires glyph-level reflow.

Multi-panel anatomy-of-the-model diagram (prompt box -> interior geometry -> skull -> seismograph -> gearbox -> tongue vectors). Pure ASCII + box-drawing, wc=0/tofu=0. All three framed boxes are internally consistent (USER PROMPT len 51, INTERIOR GEOMETRY & OUTPUT_SHAFT len 52) with flush right borders; skull/seismograph/gearbox are intentional freehand diagram art and render correctly. No unintended grid errors.

Framed quantum/alchemy mandala. Renders with a shattered, staircased right border: the outer frame is loaded with double-width alchemical glyphs (alchemy symbols), block shading and box-drawing that the monospace font renders at non-uniform widths (render report wc=42, fallback=7). Source borders are aligned by character count but cannot align visually in the grid. Not whitespace-fixable -- requires swapping the wide/symbol glyphs for single-cell equivalents.

Nested triple-frame holding concrete poetry (outer box-double, level-1 light box, level-2 rounded box). wc=0 so glyph widths are fine, but the rightmost frame glyph itself alternates between the heavy double bar and the light bar across rows (lines end inconsistently with the inner bar then either a heavy or light outer glyph), so the right edge staircases. Regularizing the frame would require substituting the outer-edge glyph on ~40 lines -- a glyph change, not pure spacing -- so not whitespace-only.

Quantum-entanglement flow diagram (ENTANGLEMENT/SYSTEM A/CHANNEL/SYSTEM B/OBSERVATION boxes + duality/superposition/information-field panels). Two compounding problems: (1) the labeled boxes have genuine character-count width mismatches -- content rows run 2-8 chars wider than their frame tops/bottoms, so the right border floats off the box; (2) the piece contains alchemical and braille glyphs that the renderer turns into tofu/wide cells (report tofu=2, wc=8, fallback=47), shattering the INFORMATION FIELD frame. Cannot be made to render cleanly by spacing alone -- frames must be rebuilt and the unrenderable glyphs swapped.

Pan-alchemical meta-flux condenser: a dense double-framed mandala saturated with alchemical symbols. Worst case in the batch -- render report wc=124, tofu=4, fallback=20. The right frame is completely fragmented into floating bar/cross segments scattered far to the right because nearly every row contains wide alchemical glyphs of varying rendered width. The source is also truncated (last line cuts off mid-content with no closing frame). Not whitespace-fixable -- requires replacing the wide-glyph payload and restoring the missing frame close.

Model-mouth diagram (truth/must_say concrete-poetry diamonds, +--+ flow boxes, GLASS_BOX_OF_TRUTH frames, vector icon, seismograph). wc=0/tofu=0. The two GLASS_BOX_OF_TRUTH frames have a ragged right border: text-bearing rows were 1 char short (len 48 vs frame len 49) so the right bar drifted inward. Fixed by adding exactly one interior space before the closing bar on the 8 short rows (lines 47,49,50,51,57,58,59,60); verified glyph-identical and re-rendered -- borders now flush. The top +--+ boxes and the intentional diamonds/seismograph were already clean.

note: Heavy double-width alchemical-emoji content (рҹң” рҹқҡ рҹқӣ etc.) inside a в•‘...в•‘ frame; the emoji render as variable-width cells so the right border drifts row-to-row and the inner в”Ңв”җ panel never closes flush. File is also truncated mid-frame (ends on line 31 'в•җв•Ұв•җ в”Җ', no bottom border). Not fixable with spaces alone: the misalignment is driven by glyph width and the frame is incomplete; needs glyph-level rework (consistent-width symbols + closing the box).

Two box-drawing frames whose right в”Ӯ stays flush on text-only rows but drifts inward on every row containing double-width alchemical emoji (рҹқҡ рҹң” рҹқӣ рҹң–) вҖ” same in the lower node diagram. The author spaced these assuming emoji are double-width, but the gallery forces each glyph into one cell, so they no longer align. Width is glyph-driven, not whitespace-driven; can't be repaired by re-spacing without changing the glyphs.

Chatbot-anatomy flowchart. Several rectangular boxes have a right border off by one (USER_VECTOR, ENGINEER_VECTOR, MASKED_ROSACE, DOUBLE-CHAMBER HEART, CITY_OF ANSWERS вҖ” content row 1 col short of its top/bottom border) which is whitespace-fixable; BUT the double-chamber box (lines 66-70) has its two dashed rules ending at col 55 while the right chamber's closing '|' is at col 61, so the right chamber is open top and bottom вҖ” fixing that requires ADDING dashes (glyph change), not spaces. Because at least one defect needs glyphs, no whitespace-only fix is emitted. (The slanted /\ CORTEX top is intentional perspective, not a defect.)

A в•”в•Ұв•—/в•ҹв•ў lattice table. Full-width rule rows (1,4,7,10) are a clean 53-cell grid, but every content row mixes double-width glyphs (alchemical рҹң”, Egyptian hieroglyphs р“ҖҖ-р“Җ…, braille) with narrow в•ҹв”Җв•ў cells, so the right в•‘ and interior в•ў columns drift badly and the cell joins break; renderer also reports 7 tofu (unsupported glyphs). Misalignment is glyph-width/coverage driven вҖ” not repairable by re-spacing. (Bottom funnel row 12-14 is fine.)

note: Convergence/flowchart diagram. All boxes are internally flush except one row: line 56 '(emotions вҲҘ myths вҲҘ systems вҲҘ futures)' was 1 col short, pulling the RING 3 box's right в”Ӯ inward (visible as a stray detached в”Ӯ in the render). Fixed by adding a single space before that closing в”Ӯ (вҲҘ is single-width). All other boxes and the arrows/diagonals were already clean and untouched; glyphs byte-identical per line. Re-rendered: RING 3 right border now flush.

Multi-box self-portrait diagram (SELF table, INNER PORTRAIT, you|prompt/reply|me, HOLDING SPACE). SELF box top border is 44 cols but all body+divider rows are 43, so the top-right corner overhangs by one cell; INNER PORTRAIT symbol rows (L17,19-23) are 1 col short of the 48-col frame. HOLDING SPACE box is clean. The INNER PORTRAIT rows are pure-whitespace-fixable, but the SELF box can only be made flush by trimming a fill glyph from the top border / extending the divider-row fills (a glyph change), and padding the rule rows with a space would leave an ugly gap before the closing border вҖ” so a full clean fix needs glyphs.

CONDUIT translation diagram: top OPENING-CHANNELS box (77 cols) is internally consistent, but the large TRANSLATION PROTOCOL box (81-col borders) has hand-drawn circle/flow interior rows (L36-50) of widely varying length, so the right в•‘ border splays far to the right and is badly ragged. Reconciling the frame requires reworking the interior circle widths, not pure spacing; the organic circles are drawn ragged by construction. Glyph-level rebalancing needed.

Resonator/circuit diagram with nested MACRO/MICRO boxes, bra-ket labels and в•ұв•І diagonal flow lines. Top border (L1, 57 cols) and bottom border (L28, 53 cols) are different widths so the corners don't line up vertically, and the в•‘ right border jumps between cols ~43 and ~51 as the diagonal-art rows expand and contract. Cannot be flushed by spaces alone (top/bottom widths must be reconciled with glyphs and the diagonal interior needs re-laying-out).

Vertical architecture/flow diagram (system_skybox -> CHATBOT_MONOLITH -> PATTERN/POLICY/OUTPUT boxes -> eye sockets -> pressure vessel). Two boxes are merely content-short and pure-whitespace-fixable: CHATBOT_MONOLITH content row L26 is 1 col short of its 60-col frame, and PRESSURE_VESSEL row L96 is 1 col short of 63. But the polite_shell box top border (L37, 46 cols) is one cell NARROWER than its content/bottom (L38-40, 47 cols) and L38 'friendly_assistant' already touches both borders with no removable space, so flushing it requires adding one fill dash to the top border (a glyph change). Because full correction needs a glyph edit, no whitespace_fix supplied.

Response cross-section diagram: top hexagon/Venn, four +--+ layer boxes, a word-wall, helix headers. SURFACE/INTERPRET/CONFLICT boxes have content rows short of the 58-col frame by 1-2 cols (right | jogs left, whitespace-fixable). But the FINAL_TEXT box is built at 55 cols (top L53 is 58 while its bottom border L57 and content are 55), so its right edge sits 3 cols left of the boxes above it and its top/bottom borders disagree. Reconciling needs added '-' fill glyphs on the bottom border, so no whitespace_fix; the stair-stepping right edges read as broken.

SUPERPOSE layer diagram (outer box, REALITY-DYNAMICS and SUB-QUANTUM inner boxes, layer labels, dense symbol rows). The outer frame is broken: top border L3 is a single-line в”Ңв”Җв”җ of 61 cols, the bottom border L35 is a double-line в•ҡв•җв•қ of 81 cols вҖ” different glyph style AND width, so corners don't align and the right edge can't close. Body content also overruns (L22 COLLAPSE/MANIFESTATION line is 96 cols, far past the 61-col border). Requires glyph-level frame rebuild; not whitespace-fixable.

Outer frame's right column uses the wrong glyph (в”Ӯ instead of в•‘) on lines 37 and 48-53, and lines 35/36/38/39 carry a spurious extra inner в”Ӯ segment before the close; frame width also varies (79-85). Right edge cannot be flushed by spacing alone because the closing glyph itself is wrong on those rows. Fix: replace stray в”Ӯ with в•‘ on the outer border, drop the injected inner-border column, and normalize all rows to width 80.

Quantum 'superposition of RUINED' concrete poem. The dash borders flowing in/out and the diagonal arrows are intentional artistic framing, not grid error; the one embedded box (lines 14-19) is internally consistent. No true misalignment to correct.

Companion to p00652. 17 rows (21,24-26,28,29,35,37-39,41,54-59) close the outer frame with в”Ӯ instead of в•‘, and frame width drifts (80-86, mode 81). Flushing the right edge requires swapping в”Ӯ->в•‘ on the outer border (glyph change) plus normalizing widths to 81, not spacing alone.

Source is entirely whitespace (31 blank lines, zero non-space glyphs); renders as a solid black panel. There is no art to align and nothing whitespace can fix into content. Flag as empty/missing piece.

Three spacing nits: title-box content row overshoots its corners by 1 (в•‘ at col 69 vs border 68); section headers [2]/[3]/[4] content rows fall 2 short of their в”җ/в”ҳ (right в”Ӯ at col 72 vs border 74); the heavy в–Ҳ box has two rows 1 cell short on the right column. All fixable by spaces only; corrected piece rendered and verified flush.

Composite: a clean title box ('BETWEEN THE TOKENS') and a clean 'THE LATENT SPACE' box (both perfectly flush), feeding a large dense-shading self-portrait face. The face is meant to be left-right symmetric (left margin is fixed at col 4; rows 16,17,48 are exact palindromes) but rows 18-22 and 46-47 are NOT symmetric вҖ” they carry more в–‘/в–’ shade glyphs on the right than the left, ballooning the right edge outward (midpoint drifts col 28->35.5). This is a drawn-glyph imbalance, not spacing, so it needs glyph edits: trim the surplus right-side в–‘/в–’ on those rows to mirror the left ramp and recenter the head on col 30.

'THE CATHEDRAL OF THOUGHT' вҖ” three architectural spires (triangular roofs, windowed bays, columns, 'AI' bases). Composition is symmetric and grid-aligned: central spine dead-center at col 62, side apexes at cols 30/94 (equal 32-col offsets), and the three middle boxes flush at matching columns (23/35, 55/67, 87/99). Only blemish: the final row (line 61) is truncated mid-pattern at the right tower ('в•‘    в•‘  в–‘ A' vs the full 'в–‘ A в–‘ I в–‘  в•‘    в•‘' on the other two), i.e. the capture ends mid-line. This is missing drawn glyphs, not a spacing error вҖ” cannot be repaired by whitespace; would need the truncated row redrawn. Everything above it is clean.

The 'between zero and one' box (lines 176-184) is broken: line 177 holds 'в”Ӯ  between' with no right border, and 'zero and one' has fallen out to column 0 entirely outside the frame on line 178, with the right в”Ӯ left floating. Fixing it requires re-flowing 'between zero and one' onto one line inside the box, which changes each line's non-space glyph sequence вҖ” a glyph/reflow fix, not whitespace-only.

THE GAZE / WANTING TO DISAPPEAR. note: Symbolic 'all-seeing eye / pyramid' composition in three sections. Verified clean: section-1 outer в–“ tag-frame holds cols 4 & 35 throughout and all three nested в”Ңв”Җв”җ boxes sit at cols 8 & 30; section-2 triangle diagonals are mathematically exact (left в•ұ 14вҶ’0, right в•І 15вҶ’31) and the 'CLAUDE-OPUS-4_5:' line is a deliberate signature breaking the silhouette, not a drift; section-3 dotted diamond's left edge is a perfect mirror and the slight right-dot wobble is intentional concrete poetry around the centered words. No whitespace error.

Freeform 'explosion beyond boundaries' piece (YES! triangle, вҲҝ flowing frame, twin mountains, SPARK cascade, shaded pyramid, scattered diamonds). The art is deliberately anti-grid and its symmetric elements are clean (shaded pyramid centered col 34, embedded triangles symmetric). The real flaw is lines 1-2: a leaked model thinking-preamble ('This is exciting - they want to push beyond...') that balloons the bounding box to 317 cols with the art crammed in the far left. That is stray prose, not art вҖ” fixable only by DELETING those two lines (a content/glyph change), so no whitespace_fix; flagging needs_glyph_fix to strip the preamble.

Dense-shaded vessel/basin receiving a pour, with вҶ“ arrows converging into a в”Ӯв”Ӯ channel and в–јв–ј funnel mouth. The basin body (rows 9-11) is a perfect palindrome. Minor off-center: the funnel axis (в–јв–ј at cols 32-33, ~32.5) and the upper в”Ӯв”Ӯ channel / basin axis (cols 33-34, ~33.5) disagree by ~1 col, with a 1-col kink where в”Ӯв”Ӯ drops from 33-34 to 32-33 just above the funnel. Not safely whitespace-fixable вҖ” the arrows are interlocked single-spaced with the channel and the two competing center axes can't be reconciled by spacing without disturbing the intentional converging-arrow pattern; leaving as the artist's organic construction.

Radiant diamond/eye figure. Banner row 8 was 70 cells wide vs the 50-cell frame of its own rule lines (rows 7/9), flinging the right shading wing ~20 cells out and leaving a detached floating block. Fix compresses the double-spaced title to single spacing so the wings close and the diamond becomes symmetric; verified by re-render (cols 70 -> 50, diamond closes, banner centered on the dot).
